notes: Per-layer; replaces Chorus. When MIDICCOSCRANGE config is on, threshold is 64; otherwise threshold is 1. Activates 4-voice unison.

usage: 0: Filter; 1: FM; 2: Osc 2; 3: LFO 1; 4: Morph; 5: Off
0: Random; 1: Saw; 2: Triangle; 3: Square; 4: LF Filtered Noise; 5: Random (Retrig); 6: Saw (Retrig); 7: Triangle (Retrig); 8: Square (Retrig); 9: LF Filtered Noise (Retrig)
0: Pulse Width; 1: Filter; 2: Oscillator 2; 3: Oscillator 1+2; 4: FM

parameter_description: Selects layer that receives following CCs / LFO2 Arp+Dest combo
notes: Per-layer; sets layer target. Value also encodes LFO 2 arp_hold + arp_mode + destination as a combined preset; channel 5 broadcasts to all active layers.
usage: 0: Arp Down (Hold On); 1: Arp Up (Hold On); 2: Arp Up&Down (Hold On); 3: Dest Filter (Hold Off); 4: Dest Amplitude (Hold Off); 5: Arp Random (Hold On); 6: Arp Random 2 (Hold On); 7: Dest Disabled (Hold Off); 8: Dest Osc 1+2 (Hold Off); 9: Arp Random Markov (Hold On)
0: Oscillator 2; 1: FM; 2: Pulse Width; 3: Disabled; 4: Oscillator 2 + Wave

notes: Per-layer; direct value (0~6). When MIDICCOSCRANGE config is on, full 0~127 range is mapped (value/19, clamped to 0~6).
usage: 0: Pulse Width Modulation; 1: Saw; 2: Triangle; 3: Sine; 4: Pulse; 5: Parabolic; 6: Super 7

notes: Per-layer; direct value (0~7). When MIDICCOSCRANGE config is on, full 0~127 range is mapped (value/16, clamped to 0~7).
usage: 0: Pulse Width Modulation; 1: Saw; 2: Triangle; 3: Noise; 4: Pulse; 5: Parabolic; 6: Pink Noise; 7: Super 7
0: Off; 1: Sync; 2: Ring Modulation; 3: FM via Osc 2

notes: Per-layer; may self-oscillate at high values.
Per-layer; direct value selects filter algorithm.
usage: 0: LP12; 1: LP24; 2: HP24; 3: BP24; 4: BR24; 5: HP12; 6: Formant; 7: Phaser; 8: XFilter12; 9: XFilter24; 10: YFilter12; 11: YFilter24; 12: Ladder24; 13: Ladder12; 14: SEM Classic; 15: SEM Raw
0: All Off; 1: Phaser; 2: Chorus; 3: Phaser+Chorus; 4: Unison; 5: Unison+Phaser; 6: Unison+Chorus; 7: All On
0~127: No FM to maximum FM depth

notes: Global. When On, CCs 14~45 act as click-style buttons (any non-zero value triggers a single click on the corresponding GUI button). When Off, those CCs operate as normal continuous parameters.

usage: 0: Off; 1: Asymmetric 1; 2: Symmetric; 3: Asymmetric 2; 4: Tube Warmth
0~127: Dry only to fully wet delay
0~127: No movement to full stereo width

notes: Per-layer; sets bit 0 of amp_shapes bitmask.
Per-layer; sets bit 1 of amp_shapes bitmask.
Per-layer; sets bit 2 of amp_shapes bitmask.

usage: 0: Osc 2 / Wave; 1: FM; 2: Pulse Width; 3: Filter

Global; toggles layer B active flag.

Button mode (active when CC71 is ON; range 14~45). Any value > 0 triggers a single click on the GUI Assign button.
usage: 0: Ignored; 1-127: Single click toggles morph assign

notes: Button mode. Single click cycles to next LFO 1 waveform (0 to 9 then wraps).
usage: 0: Ignored; 1-127: Cycle next waveform. Order: 0: Random; 1: Saw; 2: Triangle; 3: Square; 4: LF Filtered Noise; 5: Random (Retrig); 6: Saw (Retrig); 7: Triangle (Retrig); 8: Square (Retrig); 9: LF Filtered Noise (Retrig)

notes: Button mode. Cycles to next LFO 1 destination (0 to 4 then wraps).
usage: 0: Ignored; 1-127: Cycle next destination. Order: 0: Pulse Width; 1: Filter; 2: Oscillator 2; 3: Oscillator 1+2; 4: FM

notes: Button mode. Toggles ARP/Hold on/off; on enable sets default destination.

parameter_description: Cycle LFO 2 arpeggiator mode or destination
notes: Button mode. Cycles arp_mode (when Hold On) or lfo2_destination (when Hold Off).
usage: 0: Ignored; 1-127: Cycle next. Hold On (arp mode): 0: Down; 1: Up&Down; 2: Up; 3: Random; 4: Random 2; 5: Random Markov. Hold Off (destination): 0: Filter; 1: Amplitude; 2: Oscillator 1+2

notes: Button mode. Cycles mod env destination through GUI order.
usage: 0: Ignored; 1-127: Cycle next destination. Order: 0: Oscillator 2; 1: FM; 2: Pulse Width; 3: Disabled; 4: Oscillator 2 + Wave

notes: Button mode. Cycles Osc 1 waveform through GUI order.
usage: 0: Ignored; 1-127: Cycle next waveform. Order: 0: Pulse Width Modulation; 1: Saw; 2: Triangle; 3: Sine; 4: Pulse; 5: Parabolic; 6: Super 7

notes: Button mode. Cycles Osc 2 waveform through GUI order.
usage: 0: Ignored; 1-127: Cycle next waveform. Order: 0: Pulse Width Modulation; 1: Saw; 2: Triangle; 3: Noise; 4: Pulse; 5: Parabolic; 6: Pink Noise; 7: Super 7

notes: Button mode. Toggles amp limiter on/off.
Button mode. Toggles Osc 2 keyboard tracking on/off.

usage: 0: Ignored; 1-127: Cycle next mode. Order: 0: Off; 1: Sync; 2: Ring Modulation; 3: FM via Osc 2

notes: Button mode. Steps backward through GUI-ordered filter list (skips hidden filters).

notes: Button mode. Steps forward through GUI-ordered filter list (skips hidden filters).
usage: 0: Ignored; 1-127: Step next in GUI order: 0: LP24; 1: LP12; 2: Ladder24; 3: Ladder12; 4: XFilter24; 5: XFilter12; 6: YFilter24; 7: YFilter12; 8: SEM Classic; 9: SEM Raw; 10: HP24; 11: HP12; 12: BP24; 13: BR24; 14: Formant; 15: Phaser

notes: Button mode. Toggles filter velocity on/off.

notes: Button mode. Cycles filter distortion algorithm.
